# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

namespace = algeria_events
algeria_events.8 = {
	type = country_event
	placement = scope:algeria_algiers_state_scope
	title = algeria_events.8.t
	desc = algeria_events.8.d
	flavor = algeria_events.8.f

	duration = 3

	dlc = dlc004

	event_image = {
		video = "africa_city_center"
	}

	on_created_soundeffect = "event:/SFX/UI/Alerts/event_appear"

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/event_icons/waving_flag.dds"

	trigger = {
	# triggered by JE
	}

	immediate = {
		random_scope_state = {
			limit = {
				state_region = s:STATE_ALGIERS
			}
			save_scope_as = algeria_algiers_state_scope
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = algeria_events.8.a
		highlighted_option = yes
		default_option = yes
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = algeria_events.8.tt.1
				has_variable = algeria_constantine_var
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
		set_variable = algeria_deylik_restored
		set_capital = STATE_ALGIERS
		add_loyalists = {
			value = 0.1
			culture = cu:turkish
		}
		add_modifier = {
			name = barbary_pirates_modifier
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		s:STATE_EAST_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
	}

	option = {
		name = algeria_events.8.b
		highlighted_option = yes
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = algeria_events.8.tt.1
				has_variable = algeria_constantine_var
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				exists = c:TUR
				c:TUR ?= {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = algeria_deylik_restored
		set_capital = STATE_ALGIERS
		add_primary_culture = cu:turkish
		if = {
			limit = {
				c:TUR ?= {
					is_country_type = recognized
				}
			}
			c:TUR ?= {
				create_diplomatic_pact = {
					country = c:ALD
					type = puppet
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			c:TUR ?= {
				create_diplomatic_pact = {
					country = c:ALD
					type = vassal
				}
			}
		}
		add_modifier = {
			name = barbary_pirates_modifier
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		add_loyalists = {
			value = 0.2
			culture = cu:turkish
		}
		s:STATE_EAST_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = algeria_events.8.c
		default_option = yes
		highlighted_option = yes
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = algeria_events.8.tt.2
				has_variable = algeria_mascara_var
			}
		}
		set_variable = algeria_maghreb_restored
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
				}
			}
			activate_law = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		s:STATE_AL_RIF = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_FEZ = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_MARRAKECH = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_INNER_MOROCCO = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_EAST_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = algeria_events.8.e
		default_option = yes
		highlighted_option = yes
		trigger = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				text = algeria_events.8.tt.3
				OR = {
					has_variable = algeria_ait_abbas_var
					has_variable = algeria_touggourt_var
				}
			}
		}
		set_variable = algeria_barbary_restored
		set_capital = STATE_ALGIERS
		remove_primary_culture = cu:maghrebi
		add_modifier = {
			name = barbary_pirates_modifier
			days = very_long_modifier_time
		}
		s:STATE_TUNISIA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_AL_RIF = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_FEZ = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_MARRAKECH = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_INNER_MOROCCO = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_EAST_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
	}
	option = {
		name = algeria_events.8.g
		ruler = {
			add_modifier = {
				name = modern_jugurtha
				days = long_modifier_time
			}
		}
		add_loyalists = {
			value = 0.1
			culture = cu:berber
		}
		add_loyalists = {
			value = 0.1
			culture = cu:maghrebi
		}
		s:STATE_EAST_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
		s:STATE_SAHARA = {
			add_claim = c:ALD
		}
	}
}
